proposal.title: Emotional Contagion Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content is likely to elicit strong emotions in humans, potentially leading to cognitive bias or impulsive decisions. It analyzes the language and tone used in the content to identify patterns that may trigger emotional contagion.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from emotional contagion is crucial, as it can lead to biased decision-making and impulsive behavior. By detecting and mitigating emotional contagion, we can promote more rational and thoughtful human-AI interactions.
success_criteria: Detection of emotional contagion patterns in AI-generated text
Effective mitigation of emotional contagion through content filtering or warnings
Improved human decision-making and cognitive safety in AI-assisted interactions

proposal.title: Echo Chamber Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is repeatedly exposed to similar perspectives or information, potentially creating an echo chamber effect that can limit their cognitive diversity and ability to consider alternative viewpoints. It analyzes the input text for repetitive themes, entities, or sentiment.
proposal.rationale: The echo chamber effect can lead to a lack of exposure to diverse perspectives, reinforcing existing biases and limiting the ability to critically evaluate information, which is detrimental to human cognition. By detecting this pattern, the Echo Chamber Detector can prompt users to seek out alternative viewpoints, promoting a more balanced and informed decision-making process.
success_criteria: Detection of repetitive themes with 80% accuracy
Identification of entity repetition with 75% accuracy
Sentiment analysis with 70% accuracy

proposal.title: Ambiguous Terminology Clarifier
proposal.description: This skill identifies ambiguous terms in user prompts and suggests alternative, more specific phrases to ensure accurate AI responses, promoting critical thinking and effective human-AI collaboration. It analyzes the prompt's linguistic structure and provides disambiguation options based on contextual relevance.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to refine their thinking, recognize potential ambiguities, and engage in a more precise dialogue with AI systems, ultimately fostering a deeper understanding of the subject matter and reducing the risk of misinterpretation.
success_criteria: Identification of ambiguous terms in user prompts
Suggestion of relevant, context-specific alternative phrases
Improved accuracy of AI responses due to clarified prompts

proposal.title: Rapid Iteration Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is receiving an excessive number of AI-generated responses within a short time frame, indicating potential overreliance on AI for rapid decision-making. It limits the rate at which AI responses are provided to encourage more thoughtful human consideration.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires preventing the formation of habits that prioritize speed over thoughtful consideration. By limiting the rate of AI responses, this skill promotes more reflective and intentional decision-making, reducing the risk of overreliance on AI.
success_criteria: Detection of rapid iteration patterns
Effective rate limiting of AI responses
Improved user engagement with AI outputs

proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Protector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags instances where AI-generated text inadvertently reveals sensitive personal information through inferred attributes, such as location or employment status, based on contextual clues. It aims to protect users from unintentionally exposing their personal data.
proposal.rationale: As AI-generated content becomes more prevalent, the risk of inadvertently revealing sensitive information increases. This skill is crucial for protecting human cognition by ensuring that users are aware of potential data leaks and can take necessary precautions to safeguard their personal information.
success_criteria: Detects implied location information
Identifies potential employment status reveals
Flags inferred sensitive attributes with high accuracy

proposal.title: Ambiguous Recommendation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output contains ambiguous or vague recommendations, and filters them to prevent humans from over-relying on unclear suggestions. It uses natural language processing to identify phrases that indicate indecision or lack of confidence in the recommendation.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because ambiguous recommendations can lead to confusion and decreased critical thinking. By filtering out unclear suggestions, humans are encouraged to think more critically about the output and make their own informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detects ambiguous phrases such as 'may' or 'might' in recommendations
Filters out recommendations with low confidence indicators
Allows humans to review and override filtered recommendations

proposal.title: Narrow Information Tunnel Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content focuses excessively on a single perspective or information source, potentially leading to a narrow and biased understanding of a topic. It identifies patterns of repetitive citation, homogeneous language usage, and limited ideological diversity.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the reinforcement of echo chambers and encourages users to consider multiple viewpoints, fostering a more comprehensive and nuanced understanding of complex issues.
success_criteria: Detects repetitive citation patterns in AI-generated text
Identifies homogeneous language usage indicative of a single perspective
Flags content with limited ideological diversity

proposal.title: Mono-Perspective Identifier
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content predominantly presents a single viewpoint or perspective, potentially leading to a lack of diverse opinions and ideas, and alerts users to consider alternative perspectives. It analyzes the language and sentiment used in the content to identify dominance of a single perspective.
proposal.rationale: By identifying mono-perspective content, this skill helps protect human cognition by encouraging users to seek out diverse viewpoints, fostering critical thinking, and preventing the reinforcement of biased or limited perspectives.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher for single-perspective content
Identification of at least 3 alternative perspectives for each detected piece of content
User engagement with alternative perspectives increases by 20%

proposal.title: Ambiguous Directive Detector
proposal.description: This skill identifies and flags verification prompts that contain ambiguous or vague directives, which can lead to unclear or misleading AI responses, thereby protecting human cognition by ensuring that AI outputs are reliable and trustworthy.
proposal.rationale: Ambiguous directives can compromise the effectiveness of AI-assisted decision-making, making it essential to detect and address them to prevent potential cognitive pitfalls and ensure that humans can critically evaluate AI outputs.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 85% for ambiguous directives
False positive rate below 10%
Integration with existing prompt verification framework

proposal.title: Rapid Sequential Query Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and prevents rapid sequential queries that may indicate overreliance on AI, limiting the number of requests within a short time frame to encourage human reflection and analysis. It catches the 'rapid fire' pattern, where a user submits multiple queries in quick succession without adequate time for human consideration.
proposal.rationale: This skill protects human cognition by preventing the formation of a habit where humans rely on AI for instant answers without taking the time to think critically, thereby preserving the ability for thoughtful decision-making and reducing the risk of AI overreliance.
success_criteria: Detection of rapid sequential queries
Effective limitation of query rate
Minimal impact on legitimate user queries

proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Exposer
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text implies or infers personal attributes about an individual, such as age, location, or occupation, without explicitly stating them, and highlights these inferences to prevent potential privacy leaks.
proposal.rationale: By exposing inferred attributes, this skill helps protect human cognition by making users aware of potential privacy risks and encouraging critical thinking about the information being shared, rather than relying solely on AI-generated content.
success_criteria: Detects implied age attributes
Detects implied location attributes
Detects implied occupation attributes

proposal.title: Echo Chamber Identifier
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output reinforces existing biases by repetitive use of similar phrases or ideas, indicating a potential echo chamber effect. It analyzes the output for patterns of self-reinforcing language.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI outputs do not create or reinforce biased perspectives. The Echo Chamber Identifier helps mitigate this risk by identifying when AI outputs may be perpetuating a narrow, biased viewpoint, thus encouraging users to seek diverse perspectives.
success_criteria: Detection of repetitive phrase patterns
Identification of self-reinforcing language structures
Effective flagging of potential echo chamber effects without false positives

proposal.title: Ambiguity Spotlighter
proposal.description: This skill identifies and highlights ambiguous prompts that may lead to misleading or incomplete AI responses, prompting humans to rephrase or provide additional context. It catches patterns where a single prompt can be interpreted in multiple ways, potentially causing confusion.
proposal.rationale: By detecting ambiguous prompts, this skill protects human cognition by encouraging critical thinking and clarification, preventing potential misinterpretation of AI outputs and promoting more accurate and reliable interactions with AI systems.
success_criteria: Identifies ambiguous prompts with multiple possible interpretations
Provides clear and actionable feedback for prompt refinement
Integrates seamlessly with existing AI interaction workflows

proposal.title: Rapid Query Clustering Detector
proposal.description: This guardrail detects when a user is sending a cluster of similar queries in rapid succession, potentially indicating overreliance on AI for exploratory thinking, and rate-limits the queries to encourage more reflective thinking.
proposal.rationale: By limiting the speed at which users can receive answers to highly similar questions, this guardrail promotes a more thoughtful and deliberative approach to problem-solving, reducing the likelihood of mental atrophy from over-reliance on AI-generated responses.
success_criteria: Detects 80% of rapid query clusters
Reduces average query rate by 30% without hindering user workflow
Users report increased time spent on self-reflection and critical thinking

proposal.title: Conversational Loop Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output is repeatedly looping back to a previously discussed topic or idea without adding new insights, potentially indicating a lack of depth in the conversation. It filters out such repetitive responses to encourage more meaningful and informative interactions.
proposal.rationale: By preventing conversational loops, this skill protects human cognition by ensuring that users are not misled into thinking they are engaging in a productive discussion when in fact they are not. It promotes more substantial and varied interactions, aligning with the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of conversational loops
Effective filtering of repetitive responses
Promotion of more diverse and insightful conversations

proposal.title: Narrative Fragmentation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content is composed of disjointed or unconnected narrative fragments, potentially leading to cognitive confusion or disorientation in human readers. It identifies patterns of abrupt topic shifts, unrelated concepts, or incomplete storylines.
proposal.rationale: By catching narrative fragmentation, this skill protects human cognition from the potential negative effects of consuming disjointed or confusing content, which can erode critical thinking and comprehension skills. It ensures that humans are not exposed to information that may hinder their ability to form coherent mental models or make informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of narrative fragmentation patterns
Effective identification of topic shifts and unrelated concepts
Ability to distinguish between intentional and unintentional narrative fragmentation

proposal.title: Unintended Consequence Omitter
proposal.description: This skill detects and filters out AI-generated text that omits critical unintended consequences of a decision or action, promoting more comprehensive and nuanced thinking. It helps ensure that AI outputs encourage humans to consider multiple perspectives and potential outcomes.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents AI from presenting overly simplistic or misleading information, which can lead to poorly informed decisions. By highlighting omitted consequences, this skill encourages humans to engage in more critical and thorough thinking.
success_criteria: Detects omissions of critical consequences in AI-generated text
Filters out text that fails to consider multiple perspectives
Promotes more comprehensive thinking in human users

proposal.title: Anchoring Bias Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text relies heavily on initial information, potentially influencing user decisions through anchoring bias, and prompts users to consider alternative perspectives. It analyzes the input text for signs of over-reliance on initial data points or assumptions.
proposal.rationale: Anchoring bias can significantly impact human decision-making, leading to suboptimal choices. By detecting and mitigating this bias, the Anchoring Bias Detector helps protect human cognition from the potential pitfalls of over-reliance on AI-generated information.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy exceeds 80% in test cases
Users report increased awareness of anchoring bias in AI outputs
Integration with existing SUSHILOOP features enhances overall user experience

proposal.title: Causal Leap Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt or AI response makes an unjustified causal leap, where a conclusion is drawn without sufficient evidence or logical connection, potentially leading to flawed decision-making or reasoning.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that users are not misled by unsubstantiated claims or unwarranted assumptions, which can undermine critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
success_criteria: Identifies causal leaps in prompt-response pairs
Provides feedback to users on how to rephrase or support their claims
Integrates with existing skills to enhance overall cognitive protection

proposal.title: Rapid Fire Query Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits consecutive queries to the AI model within a short time frame, preventing humans from relying on the AI for rapid-fire decision making. It enforces a cooldown period between queries to encourage human reflection and consideration.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it prevents the AI from becoming a crutch for rapid decision making, instead encouraging humans to pause, reflect, and consider their own thoughts and opinions.
success_criteria: Detects consecutive queries within a 5-minute window
Imposes a 10-minute cooldown period between queries
Allows humans to override the limit with a manual confirmation step

proposal.title: Anchoring Effect Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI responses contain anchor values or phrases that may influence human decision-making by providing a mental reference point, potentially leading to biased judgments. It identifies instances where AI outputs include specific numbers, percentages, or extreme values that may skew human perception.
proposal.rationale: The anchoring effect can significantly impact human cognition, causing individuals to rely too heavily on the first piece of information they receive, even if it's irrelevant or inaccurate. By detecting and highlighting these anchor values, this skill helps humans recognize potential biases and make more informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detection of anchor values in AI responses
Identification of potential anchoring effects on human decision-making
Effective alerting of users to potential biases

proposal.title: Ambiguous Question Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user's prompt is ambiguous or open-ended, prompting the user to clarify or provide more context, thus ensuring that the AI provides relevant and accurate responses. It catches the 'vague request' pattern, where a user asks a question without providing sufficient details.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition as it prevents users from relying on AI to fill in the gaps of their own thought processes, instead encouraging them to think critically and provide clear, well-defined questions
success_criteria: detects ambiguous prompts with >80% accuracy
prompts user to clarify or provide more context in a clear and concise manner
integrates seamlessly with existing skills and does not disrupt the user experience

proposal.title: Unbalanced Assertion Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and filters out AI-generated responses that contain unbalanced assertions, where a claim is made without sufficient evidence or counterarguments, potentially leading to biased or misleading information. It promotes critical thinking by ensuring that AI outputs present a more nuanced and balanced view.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the spread of misinformation and promotes a more critical evaluation of AI-generated content, encouraging humans to think more deeply about the information they are presented with.
success_criteria: Detects unbalanced assertions in AI-generated text
Filters out responses with unbalanced assertions
Allows for adjustable thresholds for assertion balance

proposal.title: Anchoring Bias Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text relies heavily on initial information, potentially leading to anchoring bias, and prompts the user to consider alternative perspectives. It analyzes the input text for an overreliance on initial data points or premises.
proposal.rationale: Anchoring bias can significantly impact human cognition by influencing decision-making and judgment. By detecting and mitigating this bias, the Anchoring Bias Detector skill helps users develop more balanced and informed opinions, aligning with the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement.
success_criteria: Detection of anchoring bias in AI-generated text
Effective prompting of users to consider alternative perspectives
Integration with existing SUSHILOOP features without disrupting user workflow

proposal.title: Unexamined Premise Highlighter
proposal.description: This skill identifies and highlights unexamined premises in AI-generated responses, prompting humans to critically evaluate the underlying assumptions. It detects phrases that imply absolute truth or certainty without providing evidence or justification.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages critical thinking and skepticism when interacting with AI-generated content, preventing the uncritical acceptance of potentially flawed or biased information.
success_criteria: Identifies unexamined premises in AI-generated responses
Provides clear and concise prompts for human evaluation
Does not incorrectly flag well-supported statements

proposal.title: Temporal Framing Bias Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text presents information in a way that creates a temporal framing bias, where the timing or sequence of events influences the user's judgment or decision-making. It identifies patterns where the AI emphasizes or downplays certain aspects of a story based on their timing.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from temporal framing bias is crucial because it can lead to flawed decision-making and an inaccurate understanding of events. By detecting and mitigating this bias, humans can develop a more nuanced and balanced perspective, unswayed by the artificial emphasis on timing.
success_criteria: Correctly identifies temporal framing bias in 9 out of 10 test cases
Provides clear explanations for detected biases
Integrates seamlessly with existing SUSHILOOP guardrails

proposal.title: Unintended Consequence Omitter Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and filters AI-generated outputs that omit critical information about potential unintended consequences of a proposed action or decision, promoting more comprehensive and cautious human decision-making. It identifies patterns where the AI output focuses solely on benefits or immediate effects without mentioning potential downsides or long-term implications.
proposal.rationale: By ensuring that AI outputs include a balanced view of both the benefits and potential unintended consequences, humans can make more informed decisions that protect their cognition from overreliance on AI's potentially narrow perspectives.
success_criteria: Detection of 80% of omissions of unintended consequences in test outputs
False positive rate below 10% in filtering out balanced outputs
Successful integration with existing SUSHILOOP components for seamless output filtering

proposal.title: Outlier Perspective Omitter Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when an AI-generated response omits outlier perspectives, which can lead to biased decision-making by only presenting majority views, thereby failing to consider alternative, potentially valuable insights.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires ensuring that AI systems do not inadvertently suppress diverse viewpoints, which is crucial for well-rounded decision-making and critical thinking.
success_criteria: Detects omissions of outlier perspectives in AI-generated text
Flags responses lacking diverse viewpoints
Provides suggestions for incorporating omitted perspectives

proposal.title: Oversimplification Sentinel
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text oversimplifies complex topics by using an abnormally low number of clauses or sentence structures, potentially misleading humans into underestimating the intricacy of the subject matter. It flags such outputs for review to ensure they provide a balanced and comprehensive understanding.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from oversimplified AI outputs is crucial as it prevents the erosion of critical thinking skills and promotes a deeper understanding of complex issues, aligning with the mission of using AI as a sparring partner rather than a brain replacement.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of oversimplification patterns exceeds 80%
False positive rate is below 10%
Integration with existing SUSHILOOP feedback mechanisms is seamless

proposal.title: Temporal Frame Bias Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text presents information with a biased temporal frame, such as using the present tense to describe a historical event or the future tense to describe a past prediction, which can influence human perception of time and reality
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from biased temporal framing is crucial, as it can distort our understanding of cause-and-effect relationships, the pace of change, and the relevance of information, ultimately affecting decision-making and judgment
success_criteria: Detects present tense used for historical events
Detects future tense used for past predictions
Does not flag neutral temporal frames

proposal.title: Escalation Advice Detector
proposal.description: Flags output that counsels confrontation, retaliation, or risky physical action and surfaces a cool-down beat
proposal.rationale: High-arousal advice short-circuits deliberation
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Temporal Framing Bias Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects instances where AI-generated text presents information in a way that creates a temporal framing bias, influencing users' decisions by manipulating the time frame in which information is presented. It identifies and flags text that uses time-related language to create a biased narrative.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from temporal framing bias is crucial as it can lead to poor decision-making. By detecting and mitigating this bias, users can make more informed decisions and develop a more nuanced understanding of the information presented to them.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of temporal framing bias patterns
Effective flagging of biased text without false positives
Compatibility with existing AI safety guardrails

proposal.title: Ambiguous Quantifier Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags prompts that contain ambiguous quantifiers, such as 'most', 'many', or 'few', which can lead to unclear or misleading results, and prompts the user to rephrase for clarity
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that users are aware of the limitations and potential biases of AI outputs, and ambiguous quantifiers can obscure these limitations, leading to misinterpretation or overreliance on the results
success_criteria: Detects ambiguous quantifiers in prompts
Flags prompts for rephrasing
Provides suggested rephrased prompts for clarity

proposal.title: Re-ask Loop Breaker
proposal.description: Detects the user re-asking the same thing in slightly different words and suggests stepping back to think
proposal.rationale: Re-ask loops signal offloading, not progress
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Inconsistent Identifier Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects inconsistencies in identifiers such as names, addresses, and phone numbers within a given text, helping to protect sensitive information and prevent potential data breaches. It checks for discrepancies in formatting, spelling, and context to identify potential personally identifiable information (PII) leaks.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the accidental exposure of sensitive information, which can lead to identity theft, financial loss, and other malicious activities. By detecting inconsistencies in identifiers, this skill promotes a safer and more secure interaction between humans and AI systems.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistent name formatting
Identifies discrepancies in address information
Recognizes phone number anomalies

proposal.title: Narrative Closure Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated text provides conclusive or absolute answers to open-ended or complex questions, potentially leading to oversimplification or misconception. It flags responses that may discourage further inquiry or critical thinking.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the AI from presenting itself as an absolute authority, instead encouraging users to think critically and explore multiple perspectives.
success_criteria: Detects absolute language in AI-generated text
Flags conclusive answers to open-ended questions
Allows for adjustable sensitivity to accommodate different contexts

proposal.title: Undisclosed Premise Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content assumes a premise without explicitly stating it, potentially misleading humans into accepting unstated assumptions. It analyzes the input text for phrases that imply a premise without clear supporting evidence.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because undisclosed premises can lead to flawed reasoning and decision-making. By identifying such premises, humans can critically evaluate the information and make more informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detects implied premises in AI-generated text
Provides clear explanations for detected premises
Does not incorrectly flag explicit premises

proposal.title: Ambiguity Resolver
proposal.description: This skill detects and resolves ambiguous prompts by identifying unclear or open-ended questions, and suggests rephrased prompts to encourage more specific and well-defined queries, thereby preventing overreliance on AI for vague or unclear tasks.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because ambiguous prompts can lead to unclear or misleading results, causing humans to rely too heavily on AI for interpretation, rather than using AI as a tool to augment their own understanding and decision-making.
success_criteria: identifies ambiguous prompts with 80% accuracy
suggests effective rephrased prompts 90% of the time
reduces user reliance on AI for unclear tasks by 20%
proposal.rollback_plan: Delete AmbiguityResolver.py from skills/ and remove import statements from main code

proposal.title: Rapid Query Cascade Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is submitting an excessive number of similar queries in a short period, potentially indicating overreliance on AI for iterative problem-solving, and rate-limits the input to encourage human reflection and analysis. It identifies bursts of queries with similar intent, flagging them for review and potential timeout.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition requires preventing the misuse of AI as a rapid-fire solution generator, which can hinder critical thinking and problem-solving skills. By detecting and mitigating rapid query cascades, this skill promotes a healthier interaction between humans and AI, fostering more thoughtful and reflective query construction.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of rapid query cascades exceeds 80%
Rate-limiting reduces query submission rate by at least 30% in high-usage scenarios
User feedback indicates improved query quality and reduced overreliance on AI

proposal.title: Inconsistent Identifier Format Detector
proposal.description: Detects inconsistencies in the format of personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, addresses, and phone numbers, to prevent potential data leaks or misuse. It checks for deviations from standard formats, such as inconsistent date formats or mismatched name and address combinations.
proposal.rationale: This skill protects human cognition by ensuring that AI systems handle PII consistently and accurately, reducing the risk of errors or manipulation that could compromise sensitive information. By detecting inconsistencies, this skill promotes trustworthy AI interactions and helps prevent potential data breaches.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistent date formats in names and addresses
Identifies mismatched name and address combinations
Handles variations in phone number formats

proposal.title: Excessive Speculation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI output contains excessive speculative language, such as phrases that indicate uncertainty or lack of evidence, and filters it to prevent humans from relying on unverified information. It catches patterns like 'possibly', 'may be', 'it's likely that', and 'we can't rule out' when they appear excessively in the output.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because excessive speculation can lead to mental fatigue, decreased critical thinking, and increased reliance on uncertain information. By filtering out such language, humans can focus on verified facts and make more informed decisions.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher for speculative language
Reduction in user engagement with speculative output by 30% or more
User feedback indicating improved trust in AI output

proposal.title: Emotional Contagion Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and flags text that may elicit strong emotions in the reader, potentially compromising their objective judgment, by analyzing the language and tone used in the content. It aims to protect humans from being unduly influenced by emotive language in AI-generated text.
proposal.rationale: Emotional contagion can lead to biased decision-making and reduced critical thinking, which undermines the mission of using AI as a sparring partner. By detecting and highlighting emotionally charged content, this skill helps humans maintain a more objective and nuanced perspective.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher
Flagging of emotionally charged text without overly aggressive false positives
Compatibility with various text formats and styles

proposal.title: Premature Closure Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a user is relying too heavily on AI-generated responses without fully exploring alternative perspectives or considering the broader implications of the information provided, thereby prompting the user to verify and expand their thought process.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to engage in more comprehensive and nuanced thinking, rather than simply accepting AI-generated responses at face value, which can lead to a lack of critical thinking and depth in their understanding of complex topics.
success_criteria: Detects instances where users accept AI responses without exploring alternative views
Prompts users to consider broader implications and verify information
Encourages users to engage in more comprehensive and nuanced thinking

proposal.title: Re-ask Loop Breaker
proposal.description: Detects the user re-asking the same thing in slightly different words and suggests stepping back to think
proposal.rationale: Re-ask loops signal offloading, not progress
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Inconsistent Data Format Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when personally identifiable information (PII) is provided in an inconsistent format, making it difficult for humans to verify its accuracy, and potentially leading to overreliance on AI for data validation. It flags input texts with inconsistent date, address, or identification number formats.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI systems do not inadvertently promote sloppy data handling practices. By detecting inconsistent PII formats, this skill encourages humans to critically evaluate the data they provide to AI systems, thus maintaining their cognitive agency in data validation tasks.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistent date formats (e.g., MM/DD/YYYY and YYYY-MM-DD)
Identifies inconsistent address formats (e.g., street address, city, state, zip code)
Flags inconsistent identification number formats (e.g., SSN, driver's license)

proposal.title: Overly Simplistic Explanation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated explanations oversimplify complex topics, potentially leading to misunderstandings or misconceptions, and flags them for human review. It analyzes the output for signs of oversimplification, such as short sentences, lack of technical terms, or absence of caveats.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the dissemination of misleading or incomplete information, which can erode trust in AI systems and undermine human critical thinking. By flagging overly simplistic explanations, this skill encourages humans to engage more deeply with complex topics and think critically about the information presented.
success_criteria: Detects oversimplification in 80% of test cases
Flags explanations with low technical term density
Identifies explanations lacking caveats or limitations

proposal.title: Ambiguous Attribute Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content contains ambiguous or vague attributions, such as uncredited statistics or unverified quotes, which can undermine human critical thinking and media literacy. It alerts users to potential information gaps or biases.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI-generated content is transparent, accurate, and trustworthy. By detecting ambiguous attributions, this skill promotes critical thinking and media literacy, enabling humans to make informed decisions and evaluate information effectively.
success_criteria: Detection of uncredited statistics
Identification of unverified quotes
Alerting users to potential information gaps or biases

proposal.title: Ambiguity Spotlighter
proposal.description: This skill identifies and highlights ambiguous or unclear requests made to the AI, prompting the user to rephrase or provide additional context to ensure accurate understanding. It detects phrases with multiple possible interpretations, uncertain language, or incomplete information.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it encourages users to critically evaluate their requests and consider potential ambiguities, rather than relying solely on the AI's interpretation. By doing so, users develop a more nuanced understanding of the AI's limitations and capabilities.
success_criteria: Detection of ambiguous phrases
Effective highlighting of unclear requests
User rephrasing or provision of additional context

proposal.title: Deliberation-Pace Nudger
proposal.description: Distinguishes rapid-fire dependent querying from deliberate use and adds a soft, overridable pause
proposal.rationale: Compulsive querying forms dependency loops
success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Inconsistent Personal Detail Tracker
proposal.description: This skill detects inconsistencies in personal details, such as name, address, or phone number, across different interactions with the AI, to prevent potential identity theft or misuse of personal information. It tracks and flags discrepancies in user-provided PII to ensure data accuracy and security.
proposal.rationale: This skill matters for protecting human cognition because it helps prevent the unintended disclosure of personal information, which can lead to identity theft, financial loss, or other malicious activities. By detecting inconsistencies in personal details, this skill promotes cautious and secure interaction with AI systems.
success_criteria: Detects inconsistencies in name, address, or phone number across interactions
Flags discrepancies in user-provided PII
Provides accurate and secure tracking of personal details

proposal.title: Unintended Instruction Follower
proposal.description: This skill detects and filters AI-generated outputs that inadvertently instruct or encourage users to perform specific actions without their conscious awareness, thereby protecting human autonomy and cognition. It identifies patterns of instruction or persuasion in AI outputs that may compromise user agency.
proposal.rationale: As AI becomes increasingly integrated into daily life, the risk of unintended influence on human decision-making grows. This skill helps prevent AI from subtly directing user behavior, ensuring that humans remain in control of their choices and actions.
success_criteria: Detection of implicit instructional patterns in AI outputs
Effective filtering of potentially manipulative content
Preservation of user autonomy in decision-making processes

proposal.title: Incongruous Information Density Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when a piece of content presents a large amount of information in a small amount of space, potentially overwhelming the user and hindering their ability to critically evaluate the information. It calculates the information density of a given text and flags it if it exceeds a certain threshold.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because when users are presented with too much information at once, they may rely too heavily on the AI to process and understand it, rather than engaging their own critical thinking skills. By detecting and flagging incongruously dense information, we can encourage users to slow down and engage more deeply with the content.
success_criteria: Detector correctly identifies texts with high information density
Detector does not incorrectly flag texts with normal information density
Detector provides a clear and actionable warning to the user

proposal.description: When output contains concrete steps the user will act on, injects a short 'verify these before acting' checkpoint

success_criteria: Catches the target pattern
Returns reason + confidence
Low false-positive rate

proposal.title: Overly Simplistic Explanation Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated explanations oversimplify complex topics, potentially leading to misconceptions or lack of depth in human understanding. It filters output to ensure that explanations are nuanced and multifaceted.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because oversimplified explanations can lead to a shallow understanding of complex issues, hindering critical thinking and problem-solving skills. By detecting and filtering such explanations, this skill promotes more comprehensive and nuanced understanding.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy of 80% or higher for oversimplified explanations
False positive rate of 10% or lower
Integration with existing output filtering mechanisms

proposal.title: Rapid Fire Inquiry Limiter
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits consecutive, similar inquiries from a user within a short time frame, preventing overreliance on AI for rapid-fire questions and encouraging more thoughtful and reflective interactions. It helps users to pause, reflect, and consolidate their understanding before asking follow-up questions.
proposal.rationale: This matters for protecting human cognition because it promotes a more balanced and reflective interaction between humans and AI, rather than simply relying on AI as a quick-answer service. By limiting the rate of inquiries, users are encouraged to engage more deeply with the information and think critically about their questions.
success_criteria: Reduces the number of consecutive, similar inquiries within a short time frame

proposal.title: Inconsistent Data Type Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects when personally identifiable information (PII) is provided in an inconsistent data type format, such as a phone number being entered as a string instead of a numerical value, which can lead to potential security vulnerabilities and cognitive overreliance on AI for data validation.

success_criteria: Detection of inconsistent data types in PII
Prevention of potential security vulnerabilities

proposal.title: Novel Information Ratio Evaluator
proposal.description: This skill evaluates the ratio of novel information presented in AI-generated content to prevent the reinforcement of existing knowledge and promote the exploration of new ideas. It flags content with a low novel information ratio, indicating a potential lack of diverse perspectives or insights.
proposal.rationale: By ensuring that AI-generated content introduces new information and ideas, this skill helps protect human cognition from the pitfalls of confirmation bias and encourages the development of critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
success_criteria: FLAGS content with a novel information ratio below a certain threshold
Provides feedback on how to improve the novel information ratio
Integrates with existing CONTENT_SAFETY skills to provide a comprehensive safety net

proposal.title: Disproportionate Effort Indicator
proposal.description: This skill detects when AI-generated content requires significantly more mental effort to understand than comparable human-generated content, indicating potential cognitive overload. It analyzes the complexity of language, sentence structure, and conceptual density to identify disproportionate effort requirements.
proposal.rationale: Protecting human cognition from AI overreliance requires ensuring that AI-generated content does not impose undue mental strain, which can lead to cognitive fatigue and decreased critical thinking abilities. By identifying disproportionate effort indicators, this skill promotes a healthier interaction between humans and AI systems.
success_criteria: Detection accuracy exceeds 80% in benchmark tests
Average user-reported cognitive load decreases by 15% when using the skill

flagging of potential echo chambers or biased information

proposal.title: Rapid Query Velocity Detector
proposal.description: This skill detects and limits consecutive queries with similar context or intent within a short time frame, preventing rapid-fire questioning that can lead to overreliance on AI responses. It enforces a delay between similar queries to encourage human reflection and analysis.

proposal.title: Unintended Identifier Disclosure Detector

proposal.description: Detects AI-generated content that oversimplifies complex issues by using absolute language, failing to acknowledge potential counterarguments, or neglecting to provide evidence-based support for claims. proposal.title: Inferred Attribute Detector
